definitions.idv: Insured Declared Value is the current value of the vehicle after depreciation and is the maximum payout in total loss
definitions.deductible: Fixed compulsory amount deducted from claim compensation
definitions.zero_depreciation: Prevents depreciation deduction in repair claims but not valid for third-party claims
definitions.total_loss: Full IDV payout when a stolen vehicle claim is approved
definitions.constructive_total_loss: Occurs when repair cost reaches 75% or more of IDV
